feed.title: Bhavik Kanejiya
feed.subtitle: Unlocking Cyber Realms: Journey into the World of Red Teaming, Pentesting, and Capture The Flag Challenges. Explore step-by-step solutions for Hack The Box (HTB) and TryHackMe challenges, gain insights into advanced penetration testing techniques, and follow along as a passionate pentester navigates the digital landscapes.

entry.title: Let’s do a peek inside the admin dashboard - Abuse API endpoint

link.title: Let’s do a peek inside the admin dashboard - Abuse API endpoint

entry.summary:
Application is vulnerable to broken access control allows employee to become the admin of a workspace.
Let’s do peek inside admin dashboard: Abuse API endpoint Header
Application introduction
It is a productivity app used by companies to track employee time and expenses.
Key Features
There are many features, but these are some of the important ones:
User can join many workspaces User...
